name: ConnectionGraphWriter

neutralConcepts: BOTH A→B and B→A adjacency entries in ONE ORM transaction
SocialConnectionEstablished emitted after T75 completes — T76-T78 are time-decoupled
knowledgeScope PRIVATE — graph edges scoped to tenant

ironRules.rule: Bidirectional graph write: BOTH A→B and B→A adjacency entries written in ONE ORM transaction — two-step write is BUILD_FAILURE (partial-write creates asymmetric graph)
connectionId = hash(sorted([userIdA, userIdB]) + ':' + tenantId) — direction-independent to prevent duplicate connection records
SocialConnectionEstablished emitted by T75 on graph write completion — T76, T77, T78 are time-decoupled. T75 must NOT wait for feed integration.

keywords: connection graph writer T75 bidirectional atomic ORM transaction direction independent connectionId
